revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-295

(Luminance) Contrast (of an object against its background)

1. Subjective assessment of the difference in luminance of an object and its background.

2. The quotient of the difference between the luminance of an object and the luminance of its background by the luminance of the background.

Symbol: C


[[Image:2-1-295 Contrast Equation.png]]


where L1 is the luminance of the background

L2 is the luminance of the object seen against the background.

{{IALAFooter}}
